partyloot.name: Healing Potion
partyloot.description: A small vial containing a red liquid that heals wounds when consumed.

partyloot.name: Rope
partyloot.description: A sturdy rope, useful for climbing or tying things up.

partyloot.name: Torch
partyloot.description: A wooden stick with a flammable material at one end, used for lighting dark areas.

partyloot.name: Dagger
partyloot.description: A small, sharp blade that can be used for close combat or as a tool.

partyloot.name: Map of the Local Area
partyloot.description: A detailed map showing the surrounding region, including landmarks and potential points of interest.

partyloot.name: Rations
partyloot.description: Packaged food supplies that can sustain a person for several days.

partyloot.name: Flint and Steel
partyloot.description: A small kit used to start fires by striking flint against steel.

partyloot.name: Small Mirror
partyloot.description: A compact mirror that can be used for signaling or checking around corners.

partyloot.name: Longsword
partyloot.description: A longsword, a versatile weapon suitable for both slashing and thrusting attacks.

partyloot.name: Water Skin
partyloot.description: A container made of leather or other materials, used for carrying water.

partyloot.name: Bandages
partyloot.description: Cloth strips used for dressing wounds and stopping bleeding.

partyloot.name: Small Bell
partyloot.description: A small bell that can be used for signaling or alerting others.
